title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Theta-Pro
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Special
description: UniFi AI Theta Pro brings an enhanced generation of the UVC-AI-Theta module with a new camera capable of seamless 4K and 180° resolution at 24 FPS , delivering detailed and smooth images. A 1 Gbps Ethernet port with PoE support (37-57V DC, maximum power consumption 12.5W) is used for connectivity. Designed for indoor use, the device supports H.264 compression and uses a powerful CPU for intelligent motion detection, person, vehicle and license plate recognition . All this in a small and…
